Craftsanity-Beta-2.description:
### OUTDATED ###

Use https://github.com/Alchav/Archipelago/releases/tag/Craftsanity-Beta-3

Back-ports the Craftsanity option from my Factorio: Space Age Without Space apworld.

Lets you choose a an exact number of locations to require crafting a specific item once instead of via science pack research.


This version fixes logic issues with the Satellite item, and only 2 or 3 Science Pack locations will be forced depending on the Silo option.
Craftsanity-Beta-2.title: Factorio: CraftSanity Beta 2

Craftsanity-Beta-3.description:
- The last science pack technology will not longer grant the Satellite recipe
- Fixes an issue capping craftsanity locations to 3 when Silo is not set to Spawn
Craftsanity-Beta-3.title: Factorio: CraftSanity Beta 3
